script: So this happened a few years ago when I was still living in a small apartment with paper-thin walls. My upstairs neighbor used to play music late at night, not super loud but just enough to keep me awake. I tried knocking a few times but he never answered, so one night around 2 AM I decided to fight noise with noise and blasted some old rock music through my speakers. Within minutes there was aggressive knocking on my door. I opened it expecting an angry confrontation, but instead the guy just stood there awkwardly and said, “Hey, sorry about the music… I didn’t realize you could hear it.” Apparently my sudden noise scared him into thinking someone was breaking into the building, and he came down to check. After that we actually ended up talking for like an hour in the hallway about music and gaming, and strangely enough we became decent friends. The funniest part is that the problem I was trying to solve with revenge noise ended up solving itself because he finally realized the walls were basically made of cardboard.
